ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the study began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the study ended */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., online survey, in-person interview) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annually, monthly) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the current version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "scale_type" TEXT /* Type of scale used for the variable (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "reverse_code" TEXT /* Information about reverse coding of the variable */,
  "recode" TEXT /* Information about recoding of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., integer, string, boolean) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for numeric variables */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for numeric variables */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., years, kilograms) */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the variable in user interfaces */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the variable was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the variable was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_categories" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waves" (
  "wave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wave */,
  "wave_name" TEXT /* Name of the wave */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wave */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the wave began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the wave ended */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the wave */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the wave */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the wave was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the wave was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_values" (
  "variable_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable value */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value */,
  "value_label" TEXT /* Label for the value in user interfaces */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_values_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "variable_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "wave_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wave */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "validity_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the validity of the data point (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_variable_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_value_id") REFERENCES variable_values ("variable_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_wave_id FOREIGN KEY ("wave_id") REFERENCES waves ("wave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
